imagePrompts.websiteHero:
# Website Image Generation Prompt — Post 1

Use the uploaded RupeeKit blank logo template as the base image. Preserve the official logo exactly as uploaded. Do not redraw, distort, recolor, crop, replace, or cover the logo.

Create a high-quality, Google Discover-friendly 16:9 website hero image, at least 1200 px wide.

Topic: Income Tax Calculator 2026: Prepare for Future Tax Planning with RupeeKit
Audience: Indian salaried individuals, self-employed professionals, and anyone interested in understanding and proactively planning for future income tax implications in India.
Visual direction: Clean India personal finance calculator visual.

Composition:
- Indian personal finance context.
- Clean calculator screen, rupee symbol, simple chart or table.
- Minimal or no text inside the image.
- No fake screenshots of RupeeKit UI unless explicitly provided.
- Keep the logo safe zone clean.
- No faces unless a realistic, generic office/family scene is necessary.
- No financial promise, no guaranteed savings/returns claim.

Style: modern, trustworthy, clean, mobile-friendly, editorial finance illustration, warm lighting, high resolution.

noImageApiPolicy: This workflow produces prompts only. It does not call Gemini image API.
